logsUnavailable: The sandbox has ended. Log polling has stopped.
logsError: Failed to load logs. Try again later.
refreshFailed: Status refresh failed. Showing the last successfully fetched data.

unavailable.title: Sandbox ended
unavailable.description: The sandbox may have expired or been deleted by another operation.

notFound.title: Sandbox not found
notFound.description: Check the sandbox ID or confirm that the sandbox has not been deleted.

loadError.title: Failed to load sandbox details
loadError.description: The sandbox details are temporarily unavailable. Check your connection and retry.

errors.resumeCapacity: Insufficient node capacity to resume this sandbox. Free capacity and retry.
errors.resumeCapacityDetail: Insufficient memory to resume (need {{need}}, used {{used}}, quota {{quota}})
errors.resumeCapacityDetailCpu: Insufficient CPU to resume (need {{need}}, used {{used}}, quota {{quota}})
